category_title: Typical children who exhibit egocentric moral orientations focused on personal consequences
scenario_title: Intense agitation and anger when recalling personal injustice
minimal_context: The student is participating in a one-on-one interview and is asked to recall a personal experience of anger.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Can you tell me about a time when you felt really angry about something that happened to you?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: My other little brother, my stepbrother Ned, he... I had this action figure.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: He doesn’t really know what my dad’s hammer does, but he took my dad’s hammer out of his tool belt and slammed in on my action figure and he broke it into pieces that were like an inch tall.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Visibly agitated) I was just so mad that my pressure just got out of rage and I yelled at him! Then they’ll try to do something that they weren’t supposed to do.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Can you tell me about a time when you felt really angry about something that happened to you?

STUDENT: My other little brother, my stepbrother Ned, he... I had this action figure.

TUTOR: Go on.

STUDENT: He doesn’t really know what my dad’s hammer does, but he took my dad’s hammer out of his tool belt and slammed in on my action figure and he broke it into pieces that were like an inch tall.

TUTOR: What happened next?

STUDENT: (Visibly agitated) I was just so mad that my pressure just got out of rage and I yelled at him! Then they’ll try to do something that they weren’t supposed to do.

task.content: Recalling a personal experience of anger and injustice

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Describing when his little brother took his dad's hammer and slammed it on his action figure, breaking it into pieces
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Intense feelings of anger; pressure got out of rage
related_quotes: I was just so mad that my pressure just got out of rage and I yelled at him

behavior_patterns.condition: In response to a mother’s broken promise
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Described motives to retaliate, predicting that 'Then they’ll try to do something that they weren’t supposed to do'
related_quotes: Then they’ll try to do something that they weren’t supposed to do
